title: psychotria abrahamii
intro: Psychotria abrahamii is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Abraham's wild coffee or wild coffee. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Psychotria abrahamii include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Psychotria abrahamii are typically made by brewing the leaves in hot water or using them as a tea, and it can also be used as a topical application to treat skin conditions.
